rooms.name: extension-registry
rooms.purpose: Maps Otto extension repositories to manifests and agent instructions.

rooms.name: cli-command-index
rooms.purpose: Latest scanned command index for the CLI extension.

rooms.name: cli-generation-history
rooms.purpose: Historical CLI generation snapshots.

rooms.name: cli-rescan-events
rooms.purpose: CLI rescan trigger log.

rooms.name: api-endpoint-index
rooms.purpose: Latest scanned endpoint index for the API extension.

rooms.name: api-generation-history
rooms.purpose: Historical API generation snapshots.

rooms.name: api-rescan-events
rooms.purpose: API rescan trigger log.

rooms.name: auth-provider-index
rooms.purpose: Latest selected auth provider index for the auth extension.

rooms.name: auth-generation-history
rooms.purpose: Historical auth generation snapshots.

rooms.name: auth-rescan-events
rooms.purpose: Auth rescan trigger log.

rooms.name: telemetry-operation-index
rooms.purpose: Latest telemetry operation snapshot across tracked long-running work.

rooms.name: telemetry-history
rooms.purpose: Historical telemetry snapshots captured during rescans.

rooms.name: telemetry-rescan-events
rooms.purpose: Telemetry rescan trigger log.

rooms.name: throughput-history
rooms.purpose: Historical throughput samples for tracked operations.

rooms.name: eta-history
rooms.purpose: Historical ETA snapshots for tracked operations.

rooms.name: repo-sync-index
rooms.purpose: Current GitOps synchronization status across all managed extension repositories.

rooms.name: repo-commit-metadata
rooms.purpose: Latest commit references captured during GitOps sync.

rooms.name: repo-remote-urls
rooms.purpose: Remote URL and visibility metadata for synchronized repositories.

rooms.name: repo-version-metadata
rooms.purpose: Version metadata collected from extension manifests and package files.

rooms.name: extension-registry-metadata
rooms.purpose: Derived metadata summary for the extension registry.
